economic_notes: Enterprise revenues from fish farming, mineral extraction, power production and rentals. Kwakiutl Nation Development Corporation is a government business enterprise. Band holds 1/3 equity in Gilakas'la Kwa Holdings Ltd. (nominal value). COVID-19 noted as ongoing economic uncertainty.
notes: Prior period restatement for year ended March 31, 2020: deferred revenue of $537,790 was added and ISC, FNHA, provincial and other revenues were reduced accordingly. The 2020 comparative figures are restated. One consolidated subsidiary (0819357 BC Ltd.) and one GBE (Kwakiutl Nation Development Corporation) accounted for by modified equity method. Band also holds a nominal 1/3 equity interest in Gilakas'la Kwa Holdings Ltd. not recorded on balance sheet; received $236,583 income from it in 2021. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,043,240) + Provincial ($2,010,569) + CMHC ($51,442) + Fisheries and Oceans Canada ($214,651) + First Nation Health Authority ($863,146) = $6,183,048. Prior year ISC forgiveness of long-term debt of $1,828,575 was a one-time item in 2020 but not in current year.
